narrative:
Jerome Township has 9,631 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
